window_summary: This window tracks the recent jgraph/drawio-desktop release stream from v26.0.7 through v30.0.4, covering core updates, Electron version bumps, platform packaging changes, and major feature shifts such as adaptive colour defaults and Windows signing certificate changes.

Tag: v26.0.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-01-24T14:28:10Z; created_at: 2025-01-23T18:47:47Z
Release notes:
## Releases Notes for 26.0.7
[Windows Installer](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v26.0.7/draw.io-26.0.7-windows-installer.exe)
[Windows No Installer](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v26.0.7/draw.io-26.0.7-windows-no-installer.exe)
[macOS - Universal](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v26.0.7/draw.io-universal-26.0.7.dmg)

**ChangeLog:**
- Updates to draw.io core 26.0.7
- Uses electron 32.2.5
- Updates to [draw.io core 26.0.7](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/blob/v26.0.7/ChangeLog). All changes from 26.0.5 to 26.0.7 are added in this build.

Tag: v30.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-09T15:26:44Z; created_at: 2026-05-09T14:28:28Z
Release notes:
## Releases Notes for 30.0.0
[Windows Installer](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.0/draw.io-30.0.0-windows-installer.exe)
[Windows No Installer (zip)](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.0/draw.io-30.0.0-windows.zip)
[macOS - Universal](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.0/draw.io-universal-30.0.0.dmg)
Linux - [deb](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.0/drawio-amd64-30.0.0.deb), [AppImage](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.0/drawio-x86_64-30.0.0.AppImage) or [rpm](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.0/drawio-x86_64-30.0.0.rpm)
Windows intel x32 releases are marked -ia32-
**ChangeLog:**
- **Major version:** new installs default to `auto` adaptive colours (matching web based draw.io); upgrades preserve `simple`. Change via Extras → Configuration.
- Windows signed cert changed, https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/discussions/2415
- Uses electron 42.0.1
- #2411 , #2236 , #2404
- Updates to [draw.io core 30.0.0](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/blob/v30.0.0/ChangeLog).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the jgraph/drawio-desktop release 30.0.0, a major version, new installs default to 'auto' adaptive colours (matching web-based draw.io) while upgrades preserve 'simple'. The Windows signed certificate has changed. The application uses Electron 42.0.1, addresses issues #2411, #2236, #2404, and updates to draw.io core 30.0.0.

[Windows No Installer (zip)](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.4/draw.io-30.0.4-windows.zip)
[macOS - Universal](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.4/draw.io-universal-30.0.4.dmg)
Linux - [deb](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.4/drawio-amd64-30.0.4.deb), [AppImage](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.4/drawio-x86_64-30.0.4.AppImage) or [rpm](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/download/v30.0.4/drawio-x86_64-30.0.4.rpm)
Windows intel x32 releases are marked -ia32-
**ChangeLog:**
- Uses electron 42.3.0
- Updates to [draw.io core 30.0.4](https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/blob/v30.0.4/ChangeLog).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the jgraph/drawio-desktop release 30.0.4, the application uses Electron 42.3.0 and updates to draw.io core 30.0.4.

questions.query_text: In the jgraph/drawio-desktop releases, which release replaces the Windows non-installer with a zip of the exe?

answer_support.answer_text: replaces the Windows non-installer with a zip of the exe (issue #2039)

questions.query_text: Across the jgraph/drawio-desktop releases, how does the Electron version used in release 26.0.15 differ from the Electron version used in release 28.2.8?

In the jgraph/drawio-desktop release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that updates to draw.io core 26.0.15 and uses Electron 34.2.0, (2) a release that addresses issues #2058 and #2059 and uses Electron 35.3.0, (3) a release that fixes a PDF title issue and uses Electron 37.2.1, (4) a release that introduces adaptive colours as default for new installs and uses Electron 42.0.1.

answer_support.answer_text: updates to draw.io core 26.0.15 and uses Electron 34.2.0
addresses issues #2058 and #2059 and uses Electron 35.3.0
fixes a PDF title issue and uses Electron 37.2.1
introduces adaptive colours as default for new installs and uses Electron 42.0.1
